mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.article_id as articleId, h.view_time as viewTime, a.title, a.cover_url as coverUrl, u.id as authorId, u.nickname as authorNickname, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM history h INNER JOIN article a ON h.article_id = a.id AND a.examine_status = 1 AND a.edit_status = 0 AND a.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY h.view_time DESC

SELECT h.article_id as articleId, COUNT(DISTINCT h.user_id) as viewCount FROM history h INNER JOIN article a ON h.article_id = a.id AND a.examine_status = 1 AND a.edit_status = 0 AND a.visible_range = 0 AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE h.is_deleted = 0 AND h.view_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY h.article_id HAVING viewCount > 0 ORDER BY viewCount DESC

SELECT h.article_id as articleId, COUNT(DISTINCT h.user_id) as viewCount, a.comment_count as commentCount, a.like_count as likeCount, a.collect_count as collectCount, a.create_time as createTime FROM history h INNER JOIN article a ON h.article_id = a.id AND a.examine_status = 1 AND a.edit_status = 0 AND a.visible_range = 0 AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE h.is_deleted = 0 AND h.view_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY h.article_id, a.id HAVING viewCount > 0 ORDER BY viewCount DESC
